name: Zoe/Loyal Servant
description:
ZOE, YOUR LOYAL AND CUTE SERVANT

She was the most voted! By the time I am writing this, she had 12 votes, ENDO had 8 votes and the Star Wars goth gf had 6 votes.

YALL, I know it’s human shimo! Also… can y’all just make your chats public? I wanna read wholesome chats😭

—————————————————————

Cutest cutie I have ever seen 😭. I’d cherish her with ALL of my life and comfort her TILL THE DAY I DIE!!!

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

YALL HAVE TO VOTE QUICK SINCE AMA EAT AND MAKE THE NEXT ONE!!!

1.Star Wars fan gf(I might also make her a goth girl and she strong af tho😭) and I could make her have asthma? Idk.

2.Endo, your clingy, lazy and streamer gf(she is a big fan of GIR from Invader Zim. She acts like GIR, optimistic and has a shit ton of energy. Extroverted too!!!)
creator: TheKitsune
